task: Run Project Confluence AlphaFold calibration pipeline against LIVE AlphaFold Protein Structure Database API

context.description: 15-dimensional ODE system modeling disease dynamics with AlphaFold structural biology integration. Currently running on mock data — needs real AlphaFold structures.

modules.alphafold_client: models/alphafold_client.py — REST client for alphafold.ebi.ac.uk, mmCIF parser, pocket detection
modules.structure_bridge: models/structure_bridge.py — Structural features → ODE parameter shifts
modules.complexity_calibrator: models/complexity_calibrator.py — Staged calibration: SIS → Δθ → Φ (L1-regularized, sign-constrained)
modules.calibration_audit_script: scripts/calibration_audit.py — Calibration audit with A-D grading

steps.name: Fetch Real Structures
steps.description: Download all 54 protein structures from AlphaFold DB for 9 disease panels. The client handles mmCIF download, parsing, pLDDT extraction, and pocket detection automatically.
steps.command: python -c "from models.alphafold_client import AlphaFoldClient, DISEASE_PANELS; client = AlphaFoldClient(cache_dir='data/alphafold_cache'); [print(f'{d}: {len(client.fetch_panel(d))} structures fetched') for d in DISEASE_PANELS]"

steps.name: Run Live Disease Scans
steps.description: Scan all 9 disease panels with real AlphaFold structures. Computes mutation impacts at key residues using real pLDDT, scores drug-target binding with real pocket geometry, runs ODE simulations.

steps.name: Run Live Calibration Audit
steps.description: Execute the full Genotype → SIS → Δθ → Φ calibration path with real pLDDT and pocket geometry. Audits sign constraints, tests cross-panel coherence, runs ±10% pLDDT stability perturbation.

steps.name: Compare Mock vs Live
steps.description: Compare calibration results between mock and live data. Report pLDDT differences, pocket geometry changes, calibration grade changes, and Φ-distance shifts.

calibration_pipeline.stage_1: SISCalibrator — monotonic weighted mapping from 5D structural features (pLDDT, stability, pocket, active_site, druggability) → composite SIS score
calibration_pipeline.stage_2: ParameterMapper — L1-regularized SIS → Δθ with sign constraints (15 genes) and plausibility bounds (±50%)
calibration_pipeline.stage_3: GlobalCalibrator — multi-start L-BFGS-B optimization maximizing Φ-alignment + cross-panel coherence - param entropy - calibration variance
calibration_pipeline.auditor: BiologicalAuditor — grades A-D based on sign violations, bound violations, stability (±10% pLDDT perturbation), cross-disease coherence

constraints.auth: AlphaFold DB is public, no API key needed
constraints.caching: Cache structures locally in data/alphafold_cache/ so repeated runs dont re-fetch
constraints.mock_fallback: Keep --mock flag working for offline development
constraints.error_handling: If any UniProt ID returns 404, log and continue with rest of panel
